title: Coal fuel for [Let's Do] HerbalBrews
description: this mod makes the [Let's Do] HerbalBrews tea kettle use coal blocks instead of blazepowder, intended to make the mod work with servers or worlds with the nether blocked
body: This mod is an addon for [Let's Do] HerbalBrews. its main purpose is to give a way to progress in the mod without the necesity of having blaze powder, especially desing for servers with the nether deactivated
